debug_info.goal:
case h
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
h : {x, y} = {x ⊔ y}
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
have h₆ : Disjoint y x := Disjoint.symm hxy
        have h₇ : y = ⊥ := by
          rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le] at h₅
          simp_all [le_bot_iff]
          <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hx, hy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy, Disjoint])
        contradiction
      | inr h₂ =>
        have h₃ : y = x ⊔ y := h₂
        have h₄ : x ≤ y := le_of_eq (by
          simp_all [sup_eq_left]

          (try aesop) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hx, hy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy, Disjoint]))
        have h₅ : Disjoint x y := hxy
        have h₆ : Disjoint y x := Disjoint.symm hxy
        have h₇ : x = ⊥ := by
          rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le] at h₅
          simp_all [le_bot_iff]
          <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hx, hy]) <;>
          (try simp_all [hxy, Disjoint])
        contradiction
    <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [hxy]) <;>
    (try simp_all [hx, hy]) <;>
    (try simp_all [hxy, Disjoint])
  exact hmax.contra contra

calc
      Disjoint x x = Disjoint x x := rfl
      _ := by
        have h₄₂ : Disjoint x y := hxy
        have h₄₃ : x = y := h₃
        rw [h₄₃] at *
        exact hxy
  have h₄₂ : x = ⊥ := by
    have h₄₃ : Disjoint x x := h₄₁
    have h₄₄ : x ⊓ x = ⊥ := h₄₃.inf_eq_bot
    have h₄₅ : x ⊓ x = x := by simp [inf_eq_min, min_eq_left]
    rw [h₄₅] at h₄₄
    exact h₄₄
  exact h₄₂

have h₅ : False := by
  have h₅₁ : ¬x = ⊥ := hx
  have h₅₂ : x = ⊥ := h₄
  exact h₅₁ h₅₂

<;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try {
      have h₂ : x ≠ x ⊔ y := by
        intro h₃

        have h₇ : x ≤ y := by

        have h₈ : x = ⊥ := by

        have h₈ : y ≤ x := by

have h₃ := h (x ⊔ y)
    simp_all [Set.mem_insert_iff]
    <;>

  exact contra hmax

calc
      Disjoint x x = Disjoint x x := rfl
      _ := by
        have h₄₂ : Disjoint x y := hxy

  have h₄₂ : x = ⊥ := by

    have h₄₄ : x ⊓ x = ⊥ := h₄₃
